title: elaboration time sformatf does not work

features.name: sformatf as argument to display function
features.description: Code should include $sformatf used as an argument directly passed to $display, $write, or similar display system function at elaboration time

features.name: elaboration time for loop with display
features.description: Code should include a for loop executing at elaboration time (outside any clocked process) that contains $display or $write statements
